ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's employment was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (e.g., full-time, part-time, contractor) */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the department belongs to */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "school_principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compensation" (
  "compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the compensation record belongs to */,
  "regular_pay" TEXT /* Regular pay amount */,
  "overtime_pay" TEXT /* Overtime pay amount */,
  "other_pay" TEXT /* Other pay amount */,
  "total_pay" TEXT /* Total pay amount */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the compensation record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the compensation record */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Pay frequency (e.g., bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the benefit record belongs to */,
  "total_benefits" TEXT /* Total benefits amount */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the benefit record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the benefit record */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "total_compensation" (
  "total_compensation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each total compensation record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the total compensation record belongs to */,
  "total_pay" TEXT /* Total pay amount */,
  "total_benefits" TEXT /* Total benefits amount */,
  "total_pay_benefits" TEXT /* Total pay and benefits amount */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the total compensation record */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the total compensation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("total_compensation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_total_compensation_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given in the performance review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_details" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the contract belongs to */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade of the employee */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "contract_file" TEXT /* Contract file (e.g., PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_details_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits_enrollment" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefits enrollment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the benefits enrollment belongs to */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit coverage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_enrollment_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the user belongs to */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for system login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll_history" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the payroll record belongs to */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "pay_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payroll */,
  "pay_type" TEXT /* Type of payroll (e.g., regular, bonus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
